title: Russian diplomat summoned by Latvia yet again
summary_full: A staffer at the Russian embassy in Rīga was summoned by the Latvian Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) on April 21st, the latest in an extremely long line of similar diplomatic summonses since the start of Russia's war in Ukraine.
